description: Create an integration test harness that spawns the compiled wc-mcp server as a child process and exercises it via the MCP JSON-RPC protocol over stdio. Playwright is not appropriate for a CLI server — use Vitest with Node child_process. Tests must: spawn build/index.js, send initialize handshake, call list tools, call specific tools with fixture data, assert correct JSON-RPC responses. This validates the full server stack end-to-end without any browser involvement.
title: Vitest stdio integration test harness

descriptionHistory.description: Install @playwright/test and create playwright.config.ts. Add E2E tests that exercise the MCP server via stdio transport with a real CEM fixture. Configure headless CI mode and headed local mode. Note: for an MCP stdio server, E2E tests spawn the server as a child process and communicate via stdin/stdout using the MCP protocol.

Create an integration test harness that spawns the compiled wc-mcp server as a child process and exercises it via the MCP JSON-RPC protocol over stdio. Playwright is not appropriate for a CLI server — use Vitest with Node child_process. Tests must: spawn build/index.js, send initialize handshake, call list tools, call specific tools with fixture data, assert correct JSON-RPC responses. This validates the full server stack end-to-end without any browser involvement.
